title: icacorea brevis
intro: Icacorea brevis, also known as the short-leaf icacorea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Icacorea brevis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Icacorea brevis is often used in tea infusions or decoctions, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
